name: Wings of Fire - RPG
description:
Includes Pyrrhia, but not Pantala. Includes all queens, and dragonets of destiny. Includes Winter, Qibli, and Kinkajou. Which means it also includes Jade Mountain Academy. Set in the latest books.

LLM'S based on how good they work for the bot:

Gemini 2.5 pro: tested, good. Extremely well for Jade Mountain, not so well with the Sand Kingdom.

(chutes) Deepseek R1 0528: untested. Chutes listens to commands and programming better. Test it for me if you want.

(chutes) Deepseek R1T Chimera: Tested by some cool guy. Doesn't obey.


(openrouter) Deepseek R1 0528: tested, very bad. Doesn't listen to the bot's code, extremely spazzy during the first test.

JLLM: untested, probably unable to handle due to the tokens.

(information mostly from wiki, altered, with commands.)
Please give feedback!
